title: Connected Sculk
description: Resource Pack that allows sculk veins to be connected.
body:
## Connected Sculk

- Sculk vein texture looking unfinished?
- Annoyed that the texture takes up the entire block?
- well be annoyed NO MORE!!

This resource pack uses the optifine method for connected textures, so either Optifine or a mod that replicates the connected textures feature (for example [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity)) is **NEEDED** for this texture pack to work. 

The 1.0 release will work for all versions from 1.19 upwards, and the 1.1 version will work for only 1.21.11.

BIG big thank you ItsMe64 for https://convertmcpack.net/, a very useful tool, which i used for the 1.1 release.
